title: Intense Filipino Tofu Curry
description: A creamy, umami-packed Bicol Express style tofu curry simmered in a wok and finished in a clay pot, topped with toasted breadcrumbs for a satisfying crunch.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, and sliced onion; sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in sliced bell pepper and green chili; cook for 2 minutes.
Sprinkle paprika, turmeric, and curry powder over the vegetables and stir for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Pour in coconut milk and soy sauce; bring to a gentle simmer.
Add cubed tofu and gently stir to coat the tofu with the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and let the curry simmer for 6 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
In a separate pan, toast breadcrumbs in a little coconut oil until golden brown, then set aside.
Pour the curry into a preheated clay pot and sprinkle the toasted breadcrumbs over the top.
Cover the clay pot and let it steam for an additional 3 minutes to meld the breadcrumb crust.
Finish the dish by squeezing lime juice and sprinkling fresh basil leaves just before serving.
Serve hot with steamed rice or quinoa.
